subject: fix(forms): graceful fallback when backend/Supabase unavailable
body:
The app crashed or showed a blocking error when Supabase env vars
were missing or the API backend was unreachable. Now it falls back
to sample forms with a subtle "demo mode" notice instead.

- supabase.ts: export `supabaseConfigured` flag instead of throwing
- api.ts: bail early when API_BASE is empty, skip auth when Supabase unconfigured
- useAuth.ts: skip auth init when Supabase unconfigured
- FormListPage.tsx: always fall back to sample forms on API failure

Tags: bugfix, resilience, demo-mode
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: form-builder
Semver: patch

title: graceful fallback when backend/Supabase unavailable
